name: simplified-ai
description: AI social media management, on-brand content creation, scheduling, analytics, and marketing workflows with Simplified.

interface.shortDescription: Create, schedule, and analyze on-brand social content.
interface.longDescription: Simplified for AI is an AI social media management and content creation plugin for marketers, agencies, and businesses. Create on-brand images, videos, and channel-native posts; manage brand kits and marketing projects; build content calendars and cross-platform campaigns; schedule safely across 13 social platforms; prepare client review bundles; and turn social media analytics into actionable next steps through the hosted Simplified MCP connector.
defaultPrompt: Plan a month of content for my connected channels.
Turn this launch brief into a cross-platform campaign.
Review social performance and recommend what to do next.
